ogTitle: South West Rocks vs South Windsor: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South West Rocks and South Windsor.
heading: South West Rocks vs South Windsor — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South West Rocks, New South Wales and South Windsor, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South West Rocks has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to South Windsor (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South West Rocks or South Windsor safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South West Rocks has a flood risk score of 34/100, while South Windsor scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South West Rocks scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. South Windsor scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South West Rocks or South Windsor?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South West Rocks has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
